_comment: Shortcut spellings for `/soliplex-template` generation (issue #92). Single source of truth for the alias/group vocabulary; read by the skill when resolving inline `key=value` tokens, NOT consumed by generate_soliplex_project.py. `aliases` map a friendly token to a generator parameter (`where`/`output_dir` is special: it routes to the `--out` argument, not params.json). `groups` name a set of parameters that a `<group>=default` token skips at their defaults. Secrets (e.g. ingester_token) deliberately have no alias and must never be accepted inline -- prompt for them. Guarded against drift from the generator's DEFAULTS by tests/unit/scripts/test_aliases_manifest.py.
